_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: Image Cropper
_meta.description: This Image Cropper component is a highly interactive and user-friendly tool built entirely with shadcn UI and React. It allows users to upload any image and crop it with precision using adjustable zoom and customizable aspect ratios, including square, 4:3, 16:9, or freeform cropping. The component provides a real-time preview of the cropped area and allows users to download the resulting image directly. Its interface leverages shadcn UI elements such as Card, Button, Select, and Slider, ensuring a clean, modern, and responsive design. This makes it ideal for applications requiring image editing features, such as profile picture selection, social media content creation, or visual content management, providing a seamless and professional user experience.
